sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa phat (na sak ding la) na sak ding la pha (ding la pha),
tawh hong sawp hi (tawh hong sawp hi)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka mawh hong phel sak zo hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong gum Topa A min thang hi,
Nisim la sa in phat ning;
Hong tung sak nuamlo ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Hong gum Pa le A hong itna,
Sihna pan hong suak ta sak a,
